name: Normalis SAL (0.9% NaCl)
description: Liquor isotonic crystalloidus. Usus est pro IV fluido resuscitatione. In concussione hemorrhagic, caute utere - magna volumina coagulopathy peior (acidisis hyperchloremica, coagulopathy dilutionalis). Hypotension permissiva praelata in trauma pendente sanguinis imperium penetrans.
dose: Incursu hemorrhagic: Limit ad 1L max pendens sanguinis imperium (hypotension permissivum). Scopum SBP 80-90 mmHg in penetrando trauma, 90 mmHg in TBI. Hypovolemia non-haemorrhagia: 500 mL bolos, candam.
warnings: Magna volumina causant acidosis metabolicae hyperchloremicae et coagulopathy dilutionalis - trias lethalis in trauma gravescit.
Lactatum Ringer (LR) praefertur pro magno-volumine trauma resuscitationis.
Noli nimis-resuscitare abdominis trauma penetrans ante sanguinem chirurgicum imperium (hypotension permissiva).

pediatric.dose: XX mL/kg IV bolus, candam. Itera max x3 (60 mL/kg totalis) antequam considerans sanguinem products.

obstetric.note: Latin resuscitatio in haemorrhagia obstetricante. Implacabilis fluida resuscitatio apta postpartum sanguinis producta ante sanguinem available.

source: JTS CPG: Damage Control Resuscitation / PHTLS
